title: bromelia urbaniana
intro: Bromelia urbaniana, also known as the 'Urban's pineapple', is a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Bromelia urbaniana include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Bromelia urbaniana include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
